reason: The PR title claims to drop `fs-extra` in favor of `fs`, and the diff shows the removal of `fs-extra` from package.json and the replacement of its methods (like `ensureDir`, `writeFile`, `readFile`, `remove`, `copy`, `existsSync`) with native `fs` equivalents (like `fs.promises.mkdir`, `fs.promises.writeFile`, `fs.promises.readFile`, `fs.promises.rm`, `fs.cp`, `fs.existsSync`).
